title: Reconnecting to Your Body
caption: Are you listening to what your body needs?
layout: Cycle diagram that shows stages of reconnecting with the body: 1. Awareness - Recognising physical sensations; 2. Reflection - Identifying emotions linked to sensations; 3. Acceptance - Embracing your body's messages; 4. Action - Taking steps to honour your body's needs.

title: The Dance of Love and Lust
caption: How's your balance between love and desire?
layout: Two-column comparison: Column 1 focuses on Love (Stability, Emotional connection, Commitment, Intimacy); Column 2 focuses on Lust (Excitement, Physical attraction, Spontaneity, Desire).

title: Communication Styles in Intimacy
caption: Are you speaking the same love language?
layout: 4-stage progression diagram highlighting the stages: 1. Identifying your style; 2. Understanding your partner's style; 3. Practising new ways to communicate; 4. Reaping the rewards of intimate connection.

title: Mindful Intimacy Practices
caption: How often do you slow down and connect?
layout: 2x2 grid with columns for Connection and Activities. Rows include Mindfulness (Breathing exercises, Sensory exploration), and Intimacy Practices (Cuddling, Eye gazing).

title: Desire Anatomy
caption: Do you know where your desire comes from?
layout: 2-column anatomical diagram illustrating the 'Desire Map': Column 1 shows Internal Factors (Hormones, Mood, Body image); Column 2 shows External Factors (Stress, Relationship dynamics, Environment).

title: The Energy Exchange in Intimacy
caption: Are you nurturing or draining your energy?
layout: Cycle diagram representing the flow of energy in intimacy: 1. Connection - Sharing presence; 2. Vulnerability - Being open; 3. Intimacy - Deepening trust; 4. Fulfilment - Finding satisfaction.

title: Emotional Baggage: The Unpacked Truth
caption: What's weighing down your relationships?
layout: Two-column comparison of Unpacked vs. Packed emotional baggage with aspects like Clarity vs. Confusion, Healing vs. Resentment, Openness vs. Guardedness, Connection vs. Isolation.

title: The Midlife Sex Renaissance
caption: Have you embraced the evolution of your sexuality?
layout: 4-stage progression showing transformation: 1. Exploration - Discovering new preferences; 2. Accepting - Letting go of insecurities; 3. Expanding - Trying new experiences; 4. Celebrating - Embracing your sexuality.

title: Triggers vs. Trampolines
caption: What lifts you up or brings you down?
layout: 2x2 grid analysing Triggers (negative patterns) vs. Trampolines (positive experiences) with Categories: Personal (self-talk), Environmental (space), Relational (communication), and Intimate (physical touch).

title: Cycles of Connection and Disconnection
caption: Are you caught in the cycle of distance?
layout: Cycle diagram that illustrates the connection process: 1. Initiation - Engaging; 2. Bonding - Deepening; 3. Disconnection - Conflicts arise; 4. Reconnection - Healing and growing.

title: Awakening Your Senses
caption: Are you fully experiencing pleasure?
layout: Two-column comparison of Senses (Touch, Taste, Sight, Sound, Smell) against Dimensions of Pleasure (Enjoyment, Attunement, Sensuality, Exploration).

title: Unpacking the Fear of Change
caption: Are you ready to let go of what's holding you back?
layout: 4-stage progression illustrating fear management: 1. Recognising fear; 2. Understanding its roots; 3. Challenging limiting beliefs; 4. Embracing change and growth.

title: Passion Projects in Midlife
caption: What sparks joy in your life beyond relationships?
layout: 2x2 grid exploring categories: Hobbies (arts, gardening), Learning (courses, new skills), Self-Care (wellness, fitness), and Socialising (meet-ups, travel).

title: Embracing Your Sexual History
caption: How does your past shape your present intimacy?
layout: Cycle diagram highlighting stages: 1. Reflection - Understanding past experiences; 2. Integration - Weaving lessons into your identity; 3. Acceptance - Honouring your journey; 4. Empowerment - Moving forward with awareness.

title: Intimacy Mind-map
caption: What elements build the intimacy bridge?
layout: Mind map showcasing central idea 'Intimacy' with branches including Trust, Communication, Vulnerability, and Shared Experiences, each with related sub-points.

title: The Intimate Journey of Self-Discovery
caption: How well do you know yourself?
layout: 4-stage progression focusing on: 1. Reflection - Self-assessment; 2. Acceptance - Embracing flaws; 3. Exploration - Trying new experiences; 4. Celebration - Honouring your evolution.

title: Authenticity vs. Performance
caption: Are you being true to yourself in intimacy?
layout: Two-column comparison contrasting Authenticity (Vulnerability, Openness, Honour) with Performance (Masks, Expectations, Inauthenticity).

title: Setting Relationship Intentions
caption: What do you want to manifest in your intimacy?
layout: Cycle diagram with steps: 1. Awareness of needs; 2. Communicating desires with your partner; 3. Aligning intentions together; 4. Manifesting desired outcomes.

title: The Seasons of Midlife Relationships
caption: Which season are you experiencing?
layout: Cycle diagram representing the four seasons: 1. Spring - New beginnings; 2. Summer - Peak intimacy; 3. Autumn - Reflection and change; 4. Winter - Hibernation and renewal.

title: Intimacy Through the Life Lens
caption: How have different life stages shaped your intimacy?
layout: Two-column comparison: Column 1 includes Stages of Life (Adolescence, Young adulthood, Motherhood, Midlife); Column 2 includes Intimacy Evolutions (First loves, Exploration, Nurturing, Deepening connection).

title: The Power of Vulnerability
caption: How open are you with your partner?
layout: 4-stage progression illustrating vulnerability: 1. Acknowledgement - Recognising fears; 2. Sharing - Communicating openly; 3. Resonating - Building mutual understanding; 4. Deepening - Enhancing intimacy.

title: The Impact of Self-Talk
caption: What's your inner dialogue saying about your intimacy?
layout: 2x2 grid comparing Negative Self-Talk (Doubts, Insecurities) with Positive Self-Talk (Confidence, Acceptance) across three themes: Sexuality, Body image, Relationships.

title: Creating an Intimacy Ritual
caption: What's your go-to practice for deep connection?
layout: Cycle diagram outlining steps: 1. Designing the ritual; 2. Setting the mood; 3. Engaging fully in presence; 4. Reflecting on the experience together.

title: Understanding Your Intimacy Patterns
caption: What patterns do you notice in your intimate life?
layout: Cycle diagram detailing common patterns: 1. Repetition - Conflicts and resolutions; 2. Recognition - Acknowledging habits; 3. Reflection - Learning from experiences; 4. Change - Developing healthier approaches.

title: The Rebirth of Sensuality
caption: Are you ready to rediscover your sensual self?
layout: Two-column comparison featuring Old Sensuality (Inhibition, Fear, Routine) vs. New Sensuality (Liberation, Exploration, Playfulness) with examples for each.
